sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: DFEV Stock Fund Price and Chart — AMEX:DFEV
feed.summary: This article provides detailed information about the Dimensional Emerging Markets Value ETF (DFEV), an actively managed fund aiming for long-term capital appreciation in emerging markets. It outlines key statistics like AUM, dividend yield, expense ratio, and holdings, along with technical and seasonal analyses. The fund invests in a diversified portfolio of value stocks across various sectors and countries, with the advisor having discretion to adjust security exposure.

feed.title: Carnival Corporation: A Low-Risk, Dividend-Yielding 'Buy' For Income Investors (NYSE:CCL)
feed.summary: Carnival Corporation is recommended as a 'buy' for income-focused investors looking for stable, market-aligned returns due to its dividend reinstatement and proprietary island expansion. The company reported record Q4 2025 revenue and an increased net margin, with future growth expected from upcoming upgrades and the unwinding of its dual listing. This move is anticipated to boost index fund demand and share price performance.

feed.title: Technical Analysis of CID HoldCo, Inc. (NASDAQ:DAIC)
feed.summary: This article provides a technical analysis of CID HoldCo, Inc. (NASDAQ: DAIC) on TradingView, presenting a summary of indicators including moving averages, oscillators, and pivots. It indicates a "Sell" signal for various timeframes based on these technical ratings. The article also includes a FAQ section explaining technical ratings, pivots, oscillators, and the reliability of technical analysis as an investment tool.

feed.title: Hewlett-Packard announces it will leave Boise by the end of 2027
feed.summary: Hewlett-Packard (HP) has announced its plans to leave Boise by the end of 2027 as part of a larger global location strategy. The company intends to consolidate its Pacific Northwest operations around two hubs in Portland and Corvallis, Oregon. This move aims to reorganize HP around eight core sites prioritized for hiring and investment, and employees will be updated on relocation or telework options by May 1.

feed.title: Is Coca-Cola's Digital Transformation a Catalyst for Margin Expansion?
feed.summary: Coca-Cola is leveraging digital transformation across its global system to improve efficiency and profitability, leading to long-term margin expansion. This includes digitizing marketing, customer engagement, and supply-chain operations for better targeting and demand forecasting. Peers like PepsiCo and Monster Beverage are also adopting similar digital strategies to boost their own efficiencies and profitability.

feed.title: Roth MKM Maintains Comstock Resources(CRK.US) With Sell Rating, Maintains Target Price $14
feed.summary: Roth MKM analyst Leo Mariani has maintained a "Sell" rating for Comstock Resources (CRK.US), with a target price of $14. According to TipRanks data, Mariani has a 68.9% success rate and a 31.8% average return over the past year. This information is intended for educational purposes and does not constitute investment advice.

feed.title: Kroger turns in modest results as it eyes growth under new CEO
feed.summary: Kroger's new CEO, Greg Foran, is prioritizing improving the in-store experience, cutting prices, and accelerating sales growth. The company reported a 2.4% identical-store sales increase (excluding fuel) in Q4 2025, driven by digital, pharmacy, and fresh sales, with overall sales reaching $34.7 billion. Foran emphasized that the focus is on executing the existing strategy better and faster, aiming for 1% to 2% identical sales growth without fuel in 2026, and achieving e-commerce profitability.

feed.title: Norwegian Luna Officially Delivered as NCL Expands Its Prima Plus Fleet
feed.summary: Norwegian Cruise Line has taken delivery of the Norwegian Luna, the second ship in its expanded Prima Plus Class, from Italian shipbuilder Fincantieri. The 156,000-gross-ton vessel, accommodating 3,565 passengers, will debut in Miami on March 23, 2026, offering Bahamas and Caribbean itineraries. This delivery strengthens the long-standing partnership between NCLH and Fincantieri, with the Luna providing diverse entertainment and dining options for guests.

feed.title: Benchmark Downgrades Diamondback Energy (NASDAQ:FANG) to Hold
feed.summary: Benchmark has downgraded Diamondback Energy (NASDAQ:FANG) from a "buy" to a "hold" rating following the company missing quarterly earnings and revenue expectations. Despite the downgrade, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average target of $189. The report also highlights recent significant insider selling by Fang Holdings and a director, modestly reducing their positions in the company.

feed.title: Diamondback Energy (NASDAQ:FANG) Price Target Raised to $216.00 at UBS Group
feed.summary: UBS Group has increased its price target for Diamondback Energy (FANG) to $216.00 from $194.00, reiterating a "buy" rating, indicating a potential 21.33% upside. This comes despite Diamondback Energy missing consensus earnings estimates in its last quarterly report, with $1.74 EPS against an expected $2.00, and revenue down 9% year-over-year. The article also notes significant insider selling, with a major shareholder and a director divesting shares, while institutional investors maintain approximately 90% ownership.

feed.title: Invitation Home (NYSE:INVH) Given New $28.00 Price Target at Wells Fargo & Company
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company has lowered its price target for Invitation Home (NYSE:INVH) to $28.00 from $31.00, maintaining an "equal weight" rating. This adjustment comes after Invitation Home reported Q-quarterly earnings per share of $0.27, missing analyst expectations of $0.48 by $0.21, though revenue slightly beat estimates. The company also provided FY2026 EPS guidance of $1.90-$1.98, which is above the average analyst forecast.

feed.title: AT&T Inc files for two-part CAD-denominated global notes offering, size not disclosed
feed.summary: AT&T Inc. has filed for a two-part global notes offering denominated in Canadian Dollars (CAD), though the total size of the offering has not been disclosed. The telecommunications company continues to expand its fiber network and recently reiterated its financial guidance for 2026 and subsequent years. This offering is part of their financial activities as they navigate the competitive telecommunications landscape.

feed.title: New 5D camera lets robots and self-checkouts see in 3D
feed.summary: Teledyne e2v has launched the Perciva™ 5D camera, an innovative imaging solution designed to provide cost-effective, reliable, and easy-to-integrate high-quality short-range 3D vision. This new camera leverages a unique Angular Sensitive Pixel technology and an on-board Neural Processing Unit to generate both 2D and 3D data from a single CMOS sensor, free from optical occlusion. It's ideal for robotics, retail self-checkout systems, and industrial process monitoring, operating efficiently in various lighting conditions without requiring an external NIR source.

feed.title: Why Is ServiceNow (NOW) Stock Soaring Today
feed.summary: ServiceNow (NOW) stock jumped 5.2% after announcing new AI solutions, "EmployeeWorks" and "Autonomous Workforce," aimed at the public sector, and forming partnerships. The company's stock has been volatile but the market views these developments as meaningful, though not fundamentally business-changing. Despite a year-to-date decline, the recent moves suggest investors are reconsidering their stance on AI-related stocks.

feed.title: Alexandria Real Estate Equities Inc (ARE) Shares Down 3.3% on Mar 5
feed.summary: Shares of Alexandria Real Estate Equities Inc (ARE) experienced a 3.3% decline in midday trading on March 5th, closing at $51.81. This places the stock significantly below its 52-week high but still above its 52-week low. Analyst forecasts suggest an average target price of $65.00, indicating a potential 25.46% upside, with a consensus "Hold" recommendation from brokerage firms.

feed.title: Truist Financial Has Lowered Expectations for United Dominion Realty Trust (NYSE:UDR) Stock Price
feed.summary: Truist Financial has reduced its target price for United Dominion Realty Trust (NYSE:UDR) from $42.00 to $41.00, while maintaining a "buy" rating, indicating a potential upside of 9.51%. Other analysts have also adjusted their price targets, resulting in a consensus "Hold" rating and an average price target of $40.96 for UDR. The stock recently traded down 0.8% to $37.44 and institutional investors hold a significant portion of the company's shares.

feed.title: Extra Space Storage (NYSE:EXR) Price Target Raised to $170.00
feed.summary: Barclays has increased its price target for Extra Space Storage (NYSE:EXR) to $170.00 from $164.00, maintaining an "overweight" rating and suggesting a potential upside of 15.45%. Other analysts have also adjusted their targets, with a consensus "Hold" rating and an average target price of $145.13. The company recently reported earnings that beat consensus estimates and provided FY 2026 guidance, while institutional investors hold a significant portion of its stock.

feed.title: Tapestry Inc (TPR, US8760301072): Coach owner navigates luxury slowdown and integration risks into 2026
feed.summary: Tapestry Inc. (TPR), owner of Coach, Kate Spade, and Stuart Weitzman, is balancing a challenging global luxury market with its planned acquisition of Capri Holdings. The company's performance is sensitive to US consumer demand, Federal Reserve policy, and the aspirational luxury market. The acquisition is a significant strategic move, promising diversification and increased scale, but also presents integration and regulatory risks.

feed.title: Public Service Enterprise Group (NYSE:PEG) Price Target Raised to $89.00
feed.summary: Barclays has raised its price target for Public Service Enterprise Group (NYSE:PEG) from $81.00 to $89.00, maintaining an "equal weight" rating, suggesting a potential upside of 6.71%. This comes after other brokerages have also adjusted their ratings and price targets, with the company currently holding a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating and a target price of $92.73. The utility provider recently reported better-than-expected Q4 earnings and revenue, but also saw an insider transaction where an SVP sold 4,700 shares.

feed.title: Public Storage (NYSE:PSA) Price Target Raised to $347.00
feed.summary: Barclays has raised its price target for Public Storage (NYSE:PSA) from $331.00 to $347.00, maintaining an "overweight" rating. This new target suggests a potential upside of 13.61% from the current stock price. Other analysts have offered varied ratings, with the stock currently holding an average "Hold" rating and an average target price of $307.13.

feed.title: CubeSmart (NYSE:CUBE) Price Target Raised to $45.00 at Barclays
feed.summary: Barclays has increased its price target for CubeSmart (NYSE:CUBE) from $43.00 to $45.00, maintaining an "equal weight" rating, indicating a potential upside of 10.70%. This adjustment comes amidst other analyst revisions, with some firms lowering price targets while maintaining "neutral" or "hold" ratings, and one downgrading the stock to "sell." CubeSmart, a real estate investment trust specializing in self-storage, currently holds an average analyst rating of "Hold" with an average price target of $44.27.

feed.title: Curbline Properties (NYSE:CURB) Stock Price Expected to Rise, Truist Financial Analyst Says
feed.summary: Truist Financial has increased its price target for Curbline Properties (NYSE:CURB) from $27.00 to $31.00, maintaining a "buy" rating, which suggests an 11.55% upside. This follows several other analyst upgrades and price target boosts for the real estate investment trust. Despite missing earnings per share estimates in its last quarterly report, the company's revenue exceeded expectations and its stock has a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating from analysts.

feed.title: Lennox International (NYSE:LII) Given New $560.00 Price Target at Wells Fargo & Company
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company has raised its price target for Lennox International (NYSE:LII) to $560.00 from $520.00, maintaining an "equal weight" rating. This new target suggests a potential upside of 5.09% for the construction company's stock. The article also notes other analyst ratings, recent insider stock sales, and institutional trading activity for Lennox International.

feed.title: Centerspace (NYSE:CSR) Price Target Lowered to $69.00 at Wells Fargo & Company
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company lowered its price target for Centerspace (NYSE:CSR) from $74.00 to $69.00, while maintaining an "equal weight" rating. Other analysts also issued "hold" or "neutral" ratings for the stock, with a consensus target price of $69.57. Centerspace recently reported quarterly earnings that missed consensus estimates and institutional investors have adjusted their holdings in the company.

feed.title: Vistra adds Enphase batteries to Texas virtual power plant | VST Stock News
feed.summary: Vistra (NYSE: VST) is expanding its residential virtual power plant program in Texas by integrating Enphase IQ Batteries through its TXU Energy brand. This "Battery Rewards" program allows customers to earn incentives by exporting stored battery power to the Texas grid during peak demand. The initiative aims to enhance grid reliability in the face of rapid load growth and uses Kraken's AI platform for real-time coordination of these distributed energy resources.

feed.title: Vistra Expands Residential Battery Aggregation Program with Enphase Energy
feed.summary: Vistra (NYSE: VST) is expanding its residential battery aggregation program, "Battery Rewards," to include Enphase Energy's IQ® Batteries, aiming to enhance grid reliability in Texas. This virtual power plant initiative, offered through Vistra's retail brand TXU Energy, allows Enphase customers to earn incentives by contributing stored battery power to the grid during peak demand. The program leverages flexible distributed energy resources to manage demand, ensuring grid stability in a rapidly growing Texas energy market and providing customers with financial benefits and continued control over their systems during outages.

feed.title: Fifth Third Bank announces new Arizona leadership
feed.summary: Fifth Third Bancorp has announced new senior leadership appointments to support its Western expansion and integration of Comerica’s operations. Cynthia H. Jordan has been named region president for Southern California and Arizona, while Geraud Smith takes on the role of region president for Northern California. Both will report to group regional president Tom Partridge and will oversee strategic direction and growth in their respective commercial banking, wealth and asset management, and commercial payment businesses.

feed.title: Fidelity National Information Services (FIS) Launches Its Insurance Risk Suite AI Assistant
feed.summary: Fidelity National Information Services (FIS) has launched its Insurance Risk Suite AI Assistant, a generative AI tool designed to provide 24/7 multilingual guidance for building and maintaining risk models. This AI assistant, embedded within FIS's Insurance Risk Suite, aims to address industry challenges like climate-driven volatility and cyber threats by streamlining complex tasks for actuaries. Future enhancements are expected to include features like code generation, automated documentation, and comprehensive explanations to further improve risk management processes.

feed.title: Barclays Maintains Rating and Raises Price Target for PEG | PEG Stock News
feed.summary: Barclays analyst Nicholas Campanella has maintained an Equal-Weight rating for Public Service Enterprise Group Incorporated (PEG) and increased its price target from $81.00 to $89.00. This adjustment represents a 9.88% increase, following a series of recent analyst activities on the stock. The average price target from 16 analysts for PEG is $89.55, suggesting a 7.44% upside from its current price, while GuruFocus estimates a fair value of $92.01, indicating a 10.39% upside.

feed.title: Here's Why You Should Add Cardinal Health Stock to Your Portfolio Now
feed.summary: Cardinal Health (CAH) is recommended as a strong buy due to its robust performance driven by pharmaceutical distribution and accelerating specialty services. The company reported strong fiscal second-quarter results with significant growth in its core Pharmaceutical and Specialty Solutions segment, and "Other" growth businesses. Despite expected moderation in profit growth in the second half of fiscal 2026 and external cost pressures in the GMPD segment, Cardinal Health's strategic expansion into higher-margin specialty therapies and adjacent businesses positions it for continued long-term growth.

feed.title: OLG, Caesars Lock Down Windsor Casino Deal
feed.summary: The Ontario Lottery and Gaming Corporation (OLG) and Caesars Entertainment Windsor Limited have finalized a 20-year agreement for Caesars to operate the Windsor casino, making it the last gaming site in Ontario to transition to OLG's modernization model. This partnership, which has existed since 1994, ensures continued economic benefits for the City of Windsor through OLG payments and requires Caesars to maintain current staffing levels for at least 18 months. The agreement solidifies Caesars' role in the region's tourism economy, promising world-class hospitality and entertainment.

feed.title: CubeSmart (CUBE) Target Price Raised to $45 by Barclays | CUBE S
feed.summary: Barclays has increased its target price for CubeSmart (CUBE) to $45 from $43, while maintaining an "Equal-Weight" rating. This adjustment reflects a slightly more optimistic outlook from Barclays on the company's future performance. Other analysts have offered varied opinions, with an average target price of $41.94 among 16 analysts, implying a 3.50% upside from the current price, and a GuruFocus estimated fair value of $44.30.

feed.title: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman LLC Urges Enphase Energy, Inc. Investors to Act: Class Action Filed Alleging Investor Harm
feed.summary: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman LLC has filed a class action lawsuit against Enphase Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: ENPH) alleging violations of federal securities laws. The lawsuit claims Enphase overstated its ability to manage inventory and mitigate the effects of the 25D Credit termination, thereby misrepresenting its financial and operational prospects. Investors who purchased Enphase securities between April 22, 2025, and October 28, 2025, are encouraged to join the case and have until April 20, 2026, to request lead plaintiff status.

feed.title: CDW Corporation (CDW) Submits a Filing For An Automatic Mixed Securities Shelf Registration
feed.summary: CDW Corporation (NASDAQ:CDW) has filed for an automatic mixed securities shelf registration, a strategic move to allow it to raise capital flexibly for growth initiatives. The company recently reported strong Q4 2025 results, exceeding earnings and revenue estimates, and anticipates low single-digit gross profit growth for 2026 with modest margin expansion. Analysts show a mixed rating with a majority recommending "Buy" and an average price target indicating significant upside potential.

feed.title: GM National Insurance Company reports 2025 results
feed.summary: GM National Insurance Company, part of General Motors, has reported its 2025 financial results. The company saw a significant increase in written premiums, reaching $59 million in 2025 compared to $20 million in 2024. Despite this growth, the carrier's net underwriting loss deepened to $80.5 million from $58 million in the previous year.

feed.title: Guarantor: JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC, guaranteed by JPMorgan Chase & Co., is offering Auto Callable Buffered Equity Notes linked to the performance of the iShares® MSCI EAFE ETF and the iShares® MSCI Emerging Markets ETF. These notes are designed for investors seeking early exit at a premium if specific conditions are met, or uncapped appreciation of the lesser performing ETF at maturity. Investors should be aware of the credit risks of both JPMorgan Financial and JPMorgan Chase & Co. and the potential for principal loss.

feed.title: 1Kosmos Brings Step-Up Identity Verification to ServiceNow for Help Desk Recovery and Sensitive Change Requests
feed.summary: 1Kosmos has integrated its high-assurance identity verification platform directly into ServiceNow AI Platform workflows. This integration aims to prevent social engineering and account takeover by providing secure identity checks for IT help desk recovery, password resets, and sensitive change requests without disrupting operations. By unifying identity proofing, biometric authentication, and cryptographic validation, 1Kosmos helps organizations enforce strong identity verification at critical points.

feed.title: VictoryShares US 500 Volatility Wtd ETF (NASDAQ: CFA) - Share Price
feed.summary: This article provides the current and historical share price data for the VictoryShares US 500 Volatility Wtd ETF (NASDAQ: CFA). The current share price is $96.05, representing a 0.39% increase today and a -0.10% movement over the last seven days. Detailed performance figures are presented for the current year, last year, this financial year, and last financial year, along with a historical daily share price chart.

feed.title: Corvus Advances Soquelitinib Into Phase 2 Eczema Trial: What Investors Should Watch
feed.summary: Corvus Pharmaceuticals Inc. (CRVS) has advanced its oral drug, soquelitinib, into a Phase 2 clinical trial (SIERRA1) for moderate to severe atopic dermatitis (eczema). The randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled study will evaluate the safety, tolerability, and preliminary efficacy of soquelitinib over a 12-week treatment period. Investors should monitor the trial's progress for potential impacts on CRVS stock, considering the competitive dermatology market and the drug's potential as a differentiated oral treatment option.

feed.title: Technical Analysis of Simplify High Yield ETF (AMEX:CDX)
feed.summary: This article provides a technical analysis of the Simplify High Yield ETF (AMEX:CDX) based on various indicators. It summarizes signals from oscillators, moving averages, and pivots, providing an overall technical rating. The analysis currently indicates a "strong sell" for CDX, emphasizing that market conditions are fluid and encouraging investors to consult multiple data sources.

feed.title: April 24th Options Now Available For Core Scientific (CORZ)
feed.summary: New options contracts for Core Scientific (CORZ) with an April 24th expiration date have become available. BNK Invest's YieldBoost formula highlights a put contract at the $13.50 strike price and a call contract at the $17.00 strike price, detailing the potential returns and risks for investors considering these options. The article provides analysis on yield opportunities for both buying shares with a covered call strategy and selling a cash-secured put.

feed.title: Walmart adds digital shelf labels to all US stores. What to know.
feed.summary: Walmart is expanding digital shelf labels to all U.S. stores within the next year, moving away from paper price tags to a centralized digital system. This change aims to improve efficiency by allowing price adjustments to be made within minutes and helping employees locate items for stocking and online orders more quickly. The digital labels do not include cameras or microphones.

feed.title: After reaching the higher Royal Caribbean loyalty levels, these are the 4 best cruises to maximize Crown & Anchor loyalty benefits
feed.summary: This article highlights how Royal Caribbean values its top-tier Crown & Anchor loyalty members and suggests four types of cruises to maximize loyalty benefits. These include President's Cruises for superfans, longer repositioning sailings to earn more points, cruises visiting private islands to utilize onboard perks, and strategic use of free Pinnacle Club cruises on new Caribbean ships. The author, a Pinnacle Club member, shares personal insights on leveraging these benefits.

feed.title: BofA reiterates Buy on McKesson stock, $970 target on CFO transition
feed.summary: BofA Securities has reiterated a Buy rating and a $970 price target for McKesson (NYSE:MCK) following its CFO transition. The firm highlighted outgoing CFO Britt Vitalone's role in navigating opioid litigation and executing a capital deployment strategy, which included oncology clinic acquisitions and contributed to a 54% stock return. The new CFO, Kenny Cheung, will focus on capital deployment priorities such as a potential Med-Surg spin-off, specialty acquisitions, and biosimilar co-manufacturing.

feed.title: US Defence Stocks Stumble Amid Iran Conflict: Lockheed Martin, Northrop Grumman Plunge Nearly 2%
feed.summary: Major US defense stocks, including Lockheed Martin, Northrop Grumman, and General Dynamics, opened lower due to the ongoing conflict with Iran. Other defense companies like Boeing and Kratos Defense also experienced sharp declines. The market sentiment was initially buoyed by news of Iran's willingness to abandon its nuclear program, but this was dismissed after fact-checking, leading to a market downturn and significant drops in major US indices.

feed.title: As Last Mile Delivery Shifts Toward Orchestration and AI, OneRail Recognized in the Gartner® Market Guide
feed.summary: OneRail, a provider of AI-native last mile fulfillment and delivery orchestration solutions, has been recognized for the third consecutive time in the 2025 Gartner® Market Guide for Last Mile Delivery Technology Solutions. This inclusion highlights OneRail's platform, OmniPoint®, which helps retailers and wholesale distributors manage complex delivery networks, make data-driven decisions, and improve performance. The recognition comes as the last mile delivery market increasingly focuses on orchestration and AI to meet evolving customer expectations and operational demands.

feed.title: TAPinto Announces Johnson & Johnson, PSE&G as New Signature Marketing Partners
feed.summary: TAPinto has announced that Johnson & Johnson and PSE&G have joined its platform as new Signature Marketing Partners. This partnership aims to enhance community engagement and local news coverage through collaborative marketing efforts.

feed.title: Rail News - CSX honors nine short lines for excellence. For Railroad Career Professionals
feed.summary: CSX recognized nine short-line partners for their outstanding collaboration, commitment to service excellence, and strong operational performance. The awards were presented at the company's Short Line Conference in Jacksonville, Florida, honoring short lines that excel in safety, service, and customer growth. Winners were selected based on net carload growth, percentage carload growth, and switch road growth, with CSX connecting to over 240 short lines across its network.

feed.title: CLSK sold one of its highest proportions of mined BTC during February.
feed.summary: CleanSpark sold 97% of its February Bitcoin production, totaling 553 BTC for $36.65 million, to finance its expansion into artificial intelligence and high-performance computing data centers. This move reflects a broader trend among Bitcoin miners pivoting towards AI as they seek to fund new infrastructure development. Despite the significant sale, CleanSpark retains 13,363 BTC in its treasury and is expanding its mining platform, including a new 300 MW campus in Texas.

feed.title: Compass Therapeutics Reports 2025 Financial Results and Provides Corporate Update
feed.summary: Compass Therapeutics has released its full 2025 financial results, highlighting significant progress in its clinical-stage pipeline. The company reported $209 million in cash and marketable securities, providing a runway into 2028. Key updates include reaching the event threshold for its tovecimig study in biliary tract cancer, expanding cohorts for CTX-8371 in TNBC and NSCLC, and FDA clearance for CTX-10726, with Phase 1 studies commencing.
